title: T-016 â€” Pick Server Actions: buildWave, releaseWave, assignPicker, executePick (scanner), resolveShortPick, reassignPicker (11-shipping-d)
prompt:
# T-016 â€” Pick/Wave Server Actions + scanner pick API

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md Â§6 D-SHP-6 Scanner-First, Â§6 D-SHP-13 QA gate, Â§11 V-SHIP-PICK-01..05, Â§15.4 SHIP-013 Wave Picking Builder, Â§15.4 SHIP-014 Pick Desktop Supervisor, Â§15.4 SHIP-015 Pick Scanner, Â§15.4 SHIP-016 Short Pick Resolve
Prototype refs: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx:455-502 (short_pick_resolve_modal), :538-562 (wave_release_modal), :564-575 (pick_reassign_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Actions for wave/pick lifecycle. Includes scanner pick API hook (consumer of 06-SCANNER session model).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/picks.ts` exports:
   - `buildWave({soIds, planned_start})` â€” creates a `waves` row + assigns selected SOs (waves.status='unreleased'); permission `ship.so.create`.
   - `releaseWave(waveId)` â€” generates pick_lists + pick_list_lines for each SO line, computing pick_sequence via route algorithm (zoneâ†’aisleâ†’bin from 05-WH locations); status='released'; outbox `shipping.wave.released`. Permission `ship.so.confirm`.
   - `assignPicker(pickListId, userId)` â€” UPDATE pick_lists.assigned_to + status='assigned'.
   - `reassignPicker(pickListId, newUserId, reason)` â€” audit-logged.
   - `executePick(pickListLineId, scannedLpId, qty)` â€” scanner endpoint: V-SHIP-PICK-01 (LP must be scanned, no manual entry â€” enforce server-side by requiring `scan_event_id` from 06-SCANNER session), V-SHIP-PICK-02 (soft quality_hold via T-013 service â€” require reason_code if severity major/medium/minor), V-SHIP-PICK-03 (hard reject if severity='critical'), V-SHIP-PICK-05 (if scannedLpId != suggested â†’ audit pick_overrides). Permission `ship.pick.execute`. Outbox `shipping.pick.executed`.
   - `resolveShortPick(pickListLineId, action)` â€” actions: ('backorder','partial','reallocate','cancel_line'); audit + outbox `shipping.pick.short_pick_resolved`.
2. All actions under `withOrgContext` (T-125). Outbox via @monopilot/outbox (T-112).
3. PIN re-verify (P2 hook): use @monopilot/e-sign (T-124) for `ship.alloc.override` calls during executePick override path (Phase 1 optional, Phase 2 mandatory).
4. No GUC reads. PII redact (T-117).
5. Rate-limit (T-121) executePick at 60 req/min/user (scanner burst tolerance).

## Files
- apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/picks.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/__tests__/picks.test.ts [create]
- packages/events/src/shipping.ts [modify â€” ShippingWaveReleased, ShippingPickExecuted, ShippingPickShortResolved, ShippingPickReassigned]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given releaseWave is called for a wave with 3 SOs, when it runs, then pick_lists are created with pick_list_lines covering each so_line, pick_sequence computed by zoneâ†’aisleâ†’bin route, status='released'; outbox shipping.wave.released emitted.
2. Given executePick is called with scannedLpId on a critical-hold LP (T-013 returns ok=false), when it runs, then throws `QualityHoldCriticalError` and no DB update (V-SHIP-PICK-03).
3. Given executePick is called with scannedLpId != suggested_lp_id and reason_code provided, when it runs, then pick_list_lines row is updated with picked_license_plate_id, and pick_overrides row is created (V-SHIP-PICK-05); outbox shipping.pick.executed emitted with override metadata.
4. Given executePick called without scan_event_id (manual LP entry attempt), when validator runs, then throws `ManualLpEntryRejectedError` (V-SHIP-PICK-01).
5. Given resolveShortPick with action='backorder', when it runs, then a backorder record is created (P1 stub â€” minimal record), pick_list_line.status='short', and outbox shipping.pick.short_pick_resolved emitted.
6. Given grep `current_setting\('app\.(tenant_id|current_org_id)'\)` on picks.ts, when run, then zero matches.

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest with testcontainers Postgres + mock scanner session asserting AC 1-6; permission gate.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run picks.test.ts && pnpm typecheck`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow executePick without scan_event_id (V-SHIP-PICK-01 server-side enforcement).
- Do not bypass T-013 quality-hold gate.
- Do not bypass pick_overrides audit when LP deviates from suggested.
- Do not call mutations outside withOrgContext.
- Do not log scanner operator PII plain (T-117 redact).
- Do not enqueue outbox outside DB tx.

pipeline_inputs.description: Pick + wave Server Actions covering buildWave, releaseWave, assignPicker, executePick (scanner), resolveShortPick, reassignPicker with V-SHIP-PICK-* enforcement and D-SHP-13 gate.
pipeline_inputs.details: Scanner-first: executePick requires scan_event_id from 06-SCANNER session (V-SHIP-PICK-01). Quality hold gate via T-013 service. pick_overrides written on FEFO deviation. Route algorithm zoneâ†’aisleâ†’bin uses 05-WH location ltree.
cross_module_dependencies: 09-quality/T-064 (consume gate â€” executePick calls holdsGuard before LP pick; V-SHIP-PICK-03 hard block per 2026-05-14 audit)
acceptance_criteria: Given releaseWave for a wave with 3 SOs, when it runs, then pick_lists + pick_list_lines are created with pick_sequence sorted by route; AND given executePick without scan_event_id, when validator runs, then throws ManualLpEntryRejectedError (V-SHIP-PICK-01).

Given executePick on a critical-hold LP (v_active_holds via 09-quality T-064), when it runs, then throws QualityHoldCriticalError (V-SHIP-PICK-03) and no DB update; AND given scannedLpId != suggested + reason_code, when it runs, then pick_overrides row inserted.
Given resolveShortPick action='backorder', when it runs, then backorder stub record created + status='short' + outbox shipping.pick.short_backorder emitted.
Given grep current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id') on picks.ts, when run, then zero matches.
test_strategy: RED: vitest with testcontainers Postgres + mock scanner session asserting AC 1-6 + permission gate.
Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run picks.test.ts && pnpm typecheck`.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow executePick without scan_event_id.
Do not bypass T-013 quality-hold gate.
Do not bypass pick_overrides audit on FEFO deviation.
Do not call mutations outside withOrgContext.
Do not log operator PII plain.
Do not enqueue outbox outside DB tx.
Do not bypass the 09-quality consume gate (T-064 v_active_holds) â€” executePick must call holdsGuard(lpId, lotId) before picking any LP.
